symbols.name: ContextHandoff

references.snippet: public static assemble(memories: MemoryItem[], mode: string, intent: string, retrievalSuppressed: boolean): ContextHandoff {

symbols.probableRootCause: The TurnContext hardening refactor added the TurnContext interface and deleted the ContextHandoff interface from ContextAssembler.ts, but did not update the assemble() method return type annotation (line 45) or the local variable type annotation (line 78). No other file depended on ContextHandoff — it was always a file-internal type. The method still works at runtime since TalaContextRouter only uses the returned .blocks property.
symbols.rationale: Change the assemble() return type from ContextHandoff to an inline object type: { blocks: ContextBlock[] } (or a named local interface). Update the body variable type to match. Do not restore any archived file — ContextHandoff existed only inside ContextAssembler.ts and had no external dependents.

fixLocations.action: Change return type from 'ContextHandoff' to '{ blocks: ContextBlock[] }' or a named local interface
Change variable type from 'ContextHandoff' to match updated return type

symbols.name: toolCategory
symbols.probableRootCause: toolCategory was a local variable in AgentService.chat() that held the classified intent string (e.g. 'coding', 'technical'). During the TurnContext hardening refactor the variable declaration was removed (intent is now read via turnObject.intent.class) but 5 downstream usage sites in the same function body were not updated. Line 1671 even has a stale comment saying 'Redundant: toolCategory already computed at top of chat()' — referring to a variable that no longer exists.
symbols.rationale: Replace all 5 occurrences of toolCategory with turnObject.intent.class, which is the canonical replacement established by the TurnContext refactor. Line 1671-1672 block is a redundant re-call to getToolDefinitions() that should be removed entirely (filteredTools already built as finalDefs at line ~1606). Lines 1680, 1696, 1839, and 2038 are straightforward substitutions. Do not restore any archived file.

fixLocations.action: Remove lines 1671-1672 entirely — redundant second getToolDefinitions() call. Reference finalDefs from line ~1606 instead, renamed to filteredTools if needed.

archivedFiles.note: All files in archive\manual-dev-tools\ are standalone verify/diagnostic scripts. None define or import ContextHandoff or toolCategory. Restore suitability: poor for all archived files.

tsconfigNotes: tsconfig.json references tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json via project references
archive\ is not listed in any include pattern and will not be compiled
No path aliases define ContextHandoff or toolCategory
No typeRoots or ambient declaration files involved
recommendedNextActions: 1. Fix ContextAssembler.ts lines 45 and 78: replace ContextHandoff with inline type or local interface
2. Fix AgentService.ts: remove redundant getToolDefinitions call on line 1672, replace 4 remaining toolCategory references with turnObject.intent.class
3. Run: tsc --noEmit to verify zero type errors
5. Manual smoke test: issue a coding task and verify prose suppression and tool gating still function correctly
